title: Montia campylostigma
intro: Montia campylostigma, also known as Rock Penny Cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the purslane family (Portulacaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Montia campylostigma include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Montia campylostigma is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, often used to treat various health conditions, including rheumatism and skin disorders.
